fact: Honey never spoils. Archaeologists have found 3,000-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs that was still perfectly edible! 🍯
A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus. It takes 243 Earth days to rotate once, but only 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun! 🪐
Octopuses have three hearts, nine brains, and blue blood! 🐙
The Eiffel Tower grows about 6 inches taller in summer due to thermal expansion of the iron! 🗼
Bananas are berries but strawberries aren't! Botanically speaking. 🍌
A group of flamingos is called a flamboyance! 🦩
The human nose can detect over 1 trillion different smells! 👃
Hot water freezes faster than cold water under certain conditions. This is called the Mpemba effect! 🥶
Cleopatra lived closer in time to the Moon landing than to the construction of the Great Pyramid! 🏛️
There are more possible iterations of a game of chess than there are atoms in the known universe! ♟️
Sharks are older than trees. Sharks have existed for around 400 million years! 🦈
The average person walks about 100,000 miles in their lifetime — equivalent to circling Earth 4 times! 🌍
A snail can sleep for 3 years! 🐌
The fingerprints of a koala are so similar to humans that they have confused crime scene investigators! 🐨
Crows can recognize and remember human faces, and hold grudges against people who wronged them! 🐦‍⬛
The shortest war in history lasted only 38–45 minutes — between Britain and Zanzibar in 1896! ⚔️
Wombat poop is cube-shaped! They produce up to 100 cube-shaped droppings per night! 🟫
There are more stars in the universe than grains of sand on all of Earth's beaches! ⭐
A bolt of lightning contains enough energy to toast 100,000 slices of bread! ⚡
The word 'nerd' was first coined by Dr. Seuss in the 1950 book 'If I Ran the Zoo'! 🤓
